demo_notes: Span-drift honesty: ADR 0004 was rewritten after derive, so its citation spans no longer match the document; the decision is excluded with a named skip instead of rendering a stale citation.

post_derive_edits.docs/adr/0004-postgres-ledger-store.md:
# 0004 — Postgres as the ledger store

Status: Accepted

## Context

The MySQL ledger (ADR 0002) lacked transactional DDL and is superseded by
this decision.

## Decision

The ledger persists to Postgres. Connection policy is being rewritten as
part of the pooling overhaul; see the ops wiki for the current driver
guidance while this section is under review.

title: A drifted source document is excluded, never mis-cited
